subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast drunk at dawn from the crimson wine of the Covenant, whence the lights have shone forth from the Centre of Mysteries, and who hast followed in the footsteps [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اصطبح من صهباء المیثاق فاستشرق الانوار من مرکز الاسرار و اتبع خطوات
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
